title: Julie’s Flank Steak
ingredients: ½ cup water, orange juice, or beef broth
instructions: Combine all ingredients and stir until brown sugar is dissolved. Place flank steak in marinade and refrigerate for 2 hours. Preheat grill to about 400 degrees F. Sear meat on both sides, then grill for about 7 minutes per side to be medium rare. Let rest 4-5 minutes, then slice against the grain. If desired, top flank steak with caramelized onions and sauteed mushrooms.
If marinating more than 2 hours, change soy sauce to ½ cup soy sauce and 1 cup oil of choice.
This was made for many a Sunday dinners at our home!
